nodes.label: Tiered Commission Accelerator (8/10/12%)
nodes.rationale: v2.1 design (effective 1 Jul 2569, COO-approved): commission escalates 8% (0-300K) -> 10% (300-500K) -> 12% (500K+) to reward big months; quarterly bonuses paid ON TOP of monthly ones explicitly to reduce deal-sandbagging across month boundaries; recurring 3% is calculated separately and excluded from brackets/quota so hunters keep hunting; 30-day clawback + onboarding requirement tie commission to real retention; ramp draw (฿5,000 months 1-3) de-risks new hires; Spark/Shop are self-serve (no commission) so sales effort concentrates on Grow+ deals.

edges.source_location: Per-deal commission table over Boost package tiers
v2.1 supersedes v1: same structure (base + commission + target bonus) with raised bases, accelerator brackets, self-serve carve-out, recurring 3%, 30-day clawback
Both solve sales incentive design; v2.1 replaces flat 8% with tiered accelerator
